description_long: This is a modern, freestanding shelving unit with a dark wood or laminate finish, supported by slender gold or brass-colored metal legs and frame. The unit features two main horizontal surfaces: an upper open shelf adorned with decorative vases and plates, and a lower compartment partially enclosed by a sliding or fixed panel in a muted blue-gray color. The lower shelf contains several books and a box, while the right side of the unit is accompanied by a large, leafy potted plant in a round, gray stone or concrete planter. The overall design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors or semi-public spaces such as lobbies or waiting areas. The visible surfaces are smooth and matte, with a combination of hard materials providing both durability and aesthetic appeal. The shelving unit is designed to support various objects and offers both open and closed storage options.
description: A modern, dark-finished shelving unit with gold metal supports, open and closed storage, and decorative items, paired with a large potted plant.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the shelving unit, with visible plates and vases on the top and the potted plant behind.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the open and closed shelves, books, boxes, decorative vases, plates, and the potted plant to the right.
description_view_2: Rear view dominated by the leafy potted plant, with the shelving unit mostly obscured except for the frame and some objects on top.
description_view_3: Back view of the shelving unit with the blue-gray panel visible, decorative items on top, and the potted plant to the left.
